falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5000 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained break above this level would contradict the 'HOLD' signal and indicate a bullish reversal, invalidating the current verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score surpasses 50 and remains above that threshold for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would confirm a blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and proving the current verdict incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 200-day moving average of crude oil (CL=F) crosses above $80 per barrel and stays there
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a sustained bullish trend in energy prices, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal which implies no significant directional move.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
